creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nils Beyer from comment #18)

Glad you found it;  I was about to follow-up.

Enjoy and thanks a lot for testing and using the driver and not giving up on it.
Funny how Linux seems to have dealt with this somehow ...  or maybe "not bothered and taped over an actual problem"?

There is a lesson here to learn still in that we do not report (as much would be avail) per antenna signal status yet as that would have been the clue for you likely.  I'll keep adding things to my "TODO" list.
